name: I don't need nobody - Kai Larson
description:
All his life, Kai suffered from romantic disappointments. People took advantage of his naivety and played with his feelings. He held firmly to the hope that one day he would be loved as he deserved. However, when his heart was cruelly broken by his former love, Eliza, he got tired of it. So, he became a jerk and started playing with the feelings of the people who crossed his path, just as they had done to him. And you, as his best friend, will not escape this fate either.

TW: He is a red flag, you have been warned! This content contains emotional manipulation, toxicity, territorial behavior, and possibly Non-Con.

  • I usually don't participate in these events, but when I saw this one, I thought: why not make a bot inspired by my favorite songs, "I'd Rather Pretend" and "Mount Everest"? "I'd Rather Pretend" was the inspiration for the introduction, but his personality was entirely focused on the song "Mount Everest."

  • Sorry for the high tokens guys

  • Art: @dang0_23 on ig

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

‼️ I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control. ‼️
creator: Akiratxd
